vcep_full_name: ENIGMA BRCA1/2 Variant Curation Expert Panel

PM2._note: ENIGMA SVI: PM2 downgraded to supporting; threshold 1/100,000 in non-Founder pop

PVS1._note: ENIGMA: full-length protein required; truncations distal to last 10% should not invoke PVS1

PP1._note: Strong segregation evidence promotes PP1 to moderate per ENIGMA

_notes: ENIGMA VCEP rules incorporate gene-specific functional assay calibration (Findlay 2018 saturation editing) under PS3.
